name: Project Name
persona: Specific description of the target user — role, context, and what they are trying to do. Not a job title alone.
problem_statement: The specific problem this project addresses. Name the failure mode, for whom, and why the existing approach is insufficient.
artifact_type: Describe what the finished thing actually is — structure and interaction, not a category label.
description: One sentence describing what this project does — no trailing period, under 160 characters
